reasons.message: Auto-merge is opt-in and not enabled for risk class "high" in autopilot.yaml; the task can still complete via human review (run `maestro handoff emit`, or set autoMergeAllowed.high: true — note: enabling auto-merge is a "loosening" and soaks for 30 days before taking effect; run `maestro policy pending` to see in-flight changes).

9 acceptance criterion/criteria lack covering evidence: dw-81524f ("ADR 0007 compute-fabric documents core principle and ADR 0006 relationship"); dw-c050c3 ("compute module with ResourcePolicy MetricMode WorkProfile TelemetryEngine and ComputeSupervisor skeleton"); dw-c8cc4c ("FiberPool work-stealing executor replaces one-thread-per-fiber ThreadSleepRuntime"); dw-efda6b ("AdmissionController throttles fibers from live telemetry vs ResourcePolicy"); dw-15b870 ("spawn_scoped_with parent budget inheritance and TokioRuntime ComputeFabric wrapper"); dw-8dbf17 ("Effect Dependency Graph auto-parallelizes independent effect binds with safety gates"); dw-b4b951 ("Parallelism and Stream map_par_adaptive use supervisor-driven thresholds and CPU spread mode"); dw-63d25e ("ClusterResourcePolicy scale_out via jobs workflow with worker Fabric executor"); dw-711084 ("Fabric installed by default at run boundaries with book skills examples and ADR 0006 migration"). Record covering evidence with `maestro evidence record --task <id> --criterion dw-81524f --command "..." --exit 0` (criterion id matches the spec's acceptance_criteria — see `maestro spec show <slug>` or the spec frontmatter).

findings.details: Diff between db63b1d0bb25821daa465ded5442b95cb14f3e99 and db63b1d0bb25821daa465ded5442b95cb14f3e99 is empty (base equals HEAD). Commit work after locking the contract — the verifier diffs from the lock-commit.
